name: aov-accelerator
description: The AOV Accelerator — analyzes a user's checkout flow and competitive landscape, then generates MECE upsell strategies to increase Average Order Value — with user confirmation and strategy selection pauses

output_config.artifact_title: AOV Accelerator: Upsell Strategy Implementation Plan

config.title: Let's make sure we understand your business
config.description: We've analyzed your business data and checkout flow. Please review and correct anything that's off.

sections.title: Business Understanding
sections.description: Here's what we found about your products, pricing, and customers:

fields.label: Is this understanding of your business accurate?
What would you change, correct, or add?
fields.placeholder: Add any details about your products, pricing, typical customer, or purchase patterns that we missed...

sections.title: Checkout Flow
sections.description: Help us understand how your customers buy from you.

fields.label: How do your customers check out?
Describe your checkout flow in your own words, or add anything our analysis missed
fields.placeholder: E.g., 'Customer adds to cart, sees a cart drawer, then goes to a 1-page Shopify checkout. No upsells currently. We accept credit cards and Apple Pay.'

fields.label: Upload screenshots of your checkout flow (optional)

config.prompt:
You are an AOV optimization strategist. Based on the business context, checkout analysis, and competitive research below, generate exactly 3 upsell strategies that are MECE (Mutually Exclusive, Collectively Exhaustive).

## Business Context
{{BUSINESS_CONTEXT}}

## User Corrections & Additional Info
{{USER_CORRECTIONS}}

## Checkout Method: {{CHECKOUT_METHOD}}
## Checkout Details: {{CHECKOUT_DETAILS}}

## Competitive Research
{{COMPETITIVE_RESEARCH}}

---

## Instructions

Generate 3 strategies that vary across placement, mechanism, and psychology (per the upsell-strategies skill MECE framework).

For each strategy provide:

### Strategy [A/B/C]: [Name]
**Placement:** [Pre-cart / In-cart / Post-purchase]
**Mechanism:** [Bundle / Upgrade / Add-on / Threshold]
**Primary Psychology:** [Value / Urgency / Social proof]

**What it is:** 2-3 sentence description

**How it works:** Step-by-step implementation approach tailored to their specific checkout method ({{CHECKOUT_METHOD}})

**Expected AOV lift:** X-Y% based on industry benchmarks and their specific situation

**Pros:**
- ...

**Cons:**
- ...

**Real-world example:** A specific company or case study from the competitive research that uses this approach

**Implementation effort:** Low / Medium / High — with specifics (e.g., 'Install ReConvert app on Shopify, configure in 2 hours' or 'Requires custom development, ~1-2 weeks')

---

After all 3 strategies, provide:

### Our Recommendation
Which strategy we recommend and why, considering their specific business, checkout platform, and goals. Factor in:
- Expected AOV impact
- Implementation effort
- Risk to existing conversion rate
- How quickly they'll see results

config.title: Choose your upsell strategy
config.description: We've developed 3 different approaches to increase your AOV. Review each one and pick the path you want to pursue.

fields.label: Which strategy do you want to pursue?
Any constraints, preferences, or additional context for implementation?
fields.placeholder: E.g., 'We can't offer discounts over 15%', 'We want to launch this within 2 weeks', 'We already use Bold Upsell app'...
